ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "raceref" INTEGER /* Reference number for the race */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course where the race is held */,
  "race_class" INTEGER /* Class of the race */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "going" INTEGER /* Track condition (1=Good, 2=Soft, etc.) */,
  "purse" INTEGER /* Purse amount for the race */,
  "runners" INTEGER /* Number of runners in the race */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the race is held */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race */,
  "prize_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the purse among the winners */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the track conditions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the course */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_number" INTEGER /* Number assigned to the horse for the race */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the horse */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the horse (1=Male, 2=Female) */,
  "foal_date" TEXT /* Date the horse was foaled */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the horse */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Sire of the horse */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Dam of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the horse */,
  "career_earnings" INTEGER /* Total career earnings of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the jockey */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the jockey */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the jockey */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the jockey in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jockeys_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the trainer */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the trainer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the trainer in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainers_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code for the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_horses" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id", "horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer */,
  "drawing" INTEGER /* Drawing position of the horse */,
  "weight_carried" INTEGER /* Weight carried by the horse */,
  "net_adjustment" INTEGER /* Net adjustment made to the horse's performance */,
  "blinker" INTEGER /* Blinker status (1=On, 0=Off) */,
  "odds" INTEGER /* Odds of the horse winning the race */,
  "weights" INTEGER /* Weights of the bets placed on the horse */,
  "latest_streak" INTEGER /* Latest performance streak of the horse */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin by which the horse finished */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race entry */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the horse in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin by which the horse finished */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES race_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
